message:
🐛 Fix eac3/ac3 audio: exclude AudioToolbox decoders, force software decode (#12)

* 🌱 chore: revert mpv log level from verbose to warn

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 Fix eac3 audio: exclude AudioToolbox decoders, add resampling filter

- Replace ad=lavc:* with -ac3_at,-eac3_at,-aac_at to explicitly exclude
  AudioToolbox decoders that silently fail on eac3/ac3 surround streams
- Add af=aformat audio filter to force s16/stereo conversion
- Add audio-normalize-downmix=yes for surround → stereo volume normalization
- Remove hwdec=no (was for video, not audio)
- Add verbose audio logging (ao=v,ad=v,af=v) for debugging
- eac3 decoder IS in bundled Avcodec (confirmed via strings inspection)
- Root cause: macOS AudioToolbox eac3_at decoder produces silent output

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
